loading.title: Confirming your account
loading.description: Please wait while we verify your confirmation link.

success.title: Account confirmed
success.description: You can now sign in to your account.

error.title: Invalid or expired link
error.description: Request a new confirmation email and try again.

idle.title: Confirm your account
idle.description: Paste the confirmation token from your email to activate your account.

confirmEmail.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from your email
